old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-14hl","title":"Inconsistent packet_hash prefix between Python sim and Rust hetero_node","description":"Python uses hashlib.sha256(payload).hexdigest()[:16] (first 8 bytes as hex str). Rust uses first 16 bytes of binary Sha256 digest for packet_hashes_sent/received sets. This breaks cross-implementation interoperability verification via packet hashes in hetero fleet tests and metrics. Violates test integrity (inconsistent oracles across impls) and correctness for sim metrics. See simulation.py:606, hetero_node.rs:145,176. P1 bug.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T14:43:11.874146287Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T14:43:11.874146287Z"}
